description: Public Transport Victoria provides public transport timetable, stop, route, disruption, and some real-time service data for Victoria, Australia. Its public-facing developer offering documented here is the timetable API used to access that transport data programmatically.
summary: Public Transport Victoria exposes one documented developer integration surface on ptv.vic.gov.au: the PTV Timetable API v3 HTTP API, authenticated with a developer ID plus request signature in query parameters.
